landing.title: Create a professional CV for Uzbekistan IT market in 5 minutes
landing.subtitle: Create an ATS-friendly resume to apply to Uzum, Humans, TBC Bank, SQB, Epam and other companies. Available in Uzbek, Russian and English.
landing.featuresSub: A platform built specifically for Uzbekistan IT professionals. Tailored to local company requirements.
landing.feature1Desc: Transform your experience and skills into professional text with AI assistance.
landing.feature2Desc: Your CV will successfully pass through local companies' ATS systems.
landing.feature3Desc: See changes instantly. Split-screen design for comfortable editing.
landing.feature4Desc: Create CVs in Uzbek (Latin), Russian, and English.
landing.feature5Desc: 3 templates for IT: Classic, Modern, and Minimal.
landing.feature6Desc: Download A4 format PDF in 3 seconds. Name_CV_Year.pdf
landing.templatesSub: 3 templates for the IT field. Each is ATS-optimized.
landing.stepsSub: Only 3 steps. No design skills required.
landing.step1Desc: Fill in personal info, experience, education, and skills through the form.
landing.step2Desc: Pick one of 3 professional templates and customize the colors.
landing.step3Desc: Check your ATS score, then download PDF with one click.
landing.ctaDesc: Create a professional CV in 5 minutes. Be ready to apply to Uzbekistan's best IT companies.

auth.loginSub: Sign in to continue building your CV
auth.passwordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters

builder.title: CV Builder
builder.emptySub: Fill in the forms on the left
builder.atsExcellent: Your CV will pass ATS systems successfully
builder.atsPoor: Your CV needs improvement — fix the following issues
